1.content:
When you got to to college you expected it to be like high school. You'd make maybe three friends and spend your afternoons playing dnd and wondering what it's like to have a girlfriend. You weren't expecting Samantha.

Samantha was a girl who talked to you. That alone is enough to make her attractive to you but she's also actually attractive. A blond with a killer body and great tits. Why does she talk to you? Who knows? You've learned not to question good things.

It started with meeting her in Theater club where you work on the sets and she actually acts. Of course she does she's hot. She found you in the cafeteria when you both had a free hour between classes and it turned into a routine. First chemistry and then an hour of chatting up Samantha then some more classes and theater with Samantha on thursday.

One day you decide to just nut up and ask Samantha to be your girlfriend. She says...
1.title: Chapter one

info.brief_description: College with a witch girlfriend. Have fun.
info.description:
When I started writing here, there was a great interactive with the premise of getting a witch girlfriend in college and I don't know what happened to it. I don't even know who made it so if your out there... I'm sorry?

I want to make something close to it because I have the memory of a goldfish that is the stupid one in their friend group of gold fish.
The girl is named Samantha she's blond and her body is magically good. Your name is Anon.

I'll add rules if I feel something goes out of hand, other than that just have good enough grammar.
